raise-hand.name: Raise Hand
raise-hand.hint: Same effect as clicking the Raise Hand button.

snatch-spotlight.name: Talking Queue
snatch-spotlight.hint: When you are speaking, finish your turn and pass spotlight to the next speaker. When spotlight is available, take it if you are next.

delay-spotlight.name: Delay Talking Turn
delay-spotlight.hint: When you are speaking, keep your hand raised but pass spotlight to the next speaker.

speakerIndication.name: Speaker Indication
speakerIndication.hint: Show a top-screen indication when someone snatches the spotlight.

handSettings.name: Hand Settings
handSettings.label: Configure Hand
handSettings.hint: Configure the hand raiser toggle mode, enabled notification modes, and their sub-settings.

xcard.name: X-Card Settings
xcard.label: Configure X-Card
xcard.hint: Configure X-Card enabled notification modes and their sub-settings.

enableQueue.name: Scene Spotlight Mode
enableQueue.hint: Enable persistent RP scene participation in toggle mode. Raised hands stay yellow, urgent hands are red, and Space snatches the green speaker spotlight when no one is speaking.

notificationTimeout.name: Notification Timeout
notificationTimeout.hint: Minimum time (seconds) between uses of Raise Hand or X-Card per player.

isToggle.label: Toggle Mode
isToggle.hint: Makes the hand raiser toggle between raise and lower states. A player lowering their hand will remove the hand icon from the list and close popout they raised.

scope.label: Show for
scope.hint: Set who will see the hand icon in the players list.

holdTime.label: Hold Time
holdTime.hint: Non-toggle mode: How long the icon remains after the animation completes.

scope.label: Show for
scope.hint: Set who will see the hand indicator on camera views when scene spotlight mode is disabled.

holdTime.label: Hold Time
holdTime.hint: Non-toggle mode: How long the camera indicator remains after the animation completes.

scope.label: Play for
scope.hint: Set who will hear the sound.

overridePath.label: Sound Path
overridePath.hint: Set a path to a sound you prefer.

scope.label: Show for
scope.hint: Set who will see the popout notification.

source.label: Popout Image
source.hint: Choose what image to display in the popout notification.

overridePath.label: Image Path
overridePath.hint: Set a path to the image displayed in the popout.

scope.label: Send to
scope.hint: Set who will see the UI notification.

permanent.label: Permanent
permanent.hint: Notification will remain until manually dismissed.

scope.label: Send to
scope.hint: Set who will see the chat message.

source.label: Chat Image
source.hint: Choose what image to display in the chat message.

overridePath.label: Image Path
overridePath.hint: You can set a path to the image displayed on the chat.

scope.label: Send to
scope.hint: Set who will receive X-Card notifications.

anonymousWarning.label: Anonymous Warnings
anonymousWarning.hint: If enabled, the X-Card will not show who triggered it.

overridePath.label: Sound Path
overridePath.hint: Set a path to a sound you prefer.

raise-my-hand.RP_SCENE_START_REQUEST: Someone wants to start RP scene
raise-my-hand.RP_SCENE_START_REQUEST_SELF: You want to start RP scene
